testcase.name: test_doula_login_success
test_midwife_login_success

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'access_token' in {'email': 'demo.midwife@truejoybirthing.com', 'full_name': 'Emily Thompson', 'onboarding_completed': True, 'picture': 'https://api.dicebear.com/7.x/lorelei/png?seed=Emily Thompson&size=200', ...}

testcase.name: test_get_doula_clients_list
testcase.error: tests/test_doula_midwife_clients_notes_phase8.py:88: in setup self.token = data["access_token"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'access_token'
